name: cycle1_velocity_zero_when_prev_return_none
description: When prev_return is None (E1 sentinel — new-day, no prior observation), the velocity computation must yield 0.0. The caller (alpha_bot_execution.py) substitutes current_return for prev_return when sentinel is detected, so velocity = current_return - current_return = 0.0. This fixture drives that caller-level contract, not the pure math_engine function.
derivation: prev_return is None => use current_return as baseline => effective_prev_return = 2.0. velocity = 2.0 - 2.0 = 0.0. threshold is typically 2.0; 0.0 < 2.0 => should_arm = False.
